question_intent: average revenue per author for titles with more than 1000 units sold, grouped by publisher city, only considering authors with a contract

plan.question_intent: average revenue per author for titles with more than 1000 units sold, grouped by publisher city, only considering authors with a contract
plan.detail_query:
SELECT leaf_1.pub_id, leaf_1.pub_name, leaf_1.city, leaf_1.title_id, leaf_1.title, leaf_1.author_count, leaf_1.total_revenue, leaf_1.revenue_per_author
FROM (SELECT publishers.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, publishers.city, titles.title_id, titles.title, COUNT(titleauthor.au_id) AS author_count, SUM(sales.qty * titles.price) AS total_revenue, SUM(sales.qty * titles.price) / COUNT(titleauthor.au_id) AS revenue_per_author
FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
JOIN titleauthor ON titles.title_id = titleauthor.title_id
JOIN authors ON titleauthor.au_id = authors.au_id
WHERE (authors.contract = 1) AND (sales.qty > 1000)
GROUP BY publishers.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, publishers.city, titles.title_id, titles.title
HAVING COUNT(titleauthor.au_id) > 0) AS leaf_1

blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY publishers.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, publishers.city, titles.title_id, titles.title

FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id

JOIN authors ON titleauthor.au_id = authors.au_id
WHERE (authors.contract = 1) AND (sales.qty > 0)
GROUP BY publishers.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, publishers.city, titles.title_id, titles.title
HAVING (COUNT(titleauthor.au_id) > 0)

SELECT *
FROM (SELECT publishers.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, publishers.city, titles.title_id, titles.title, COUNT(titleauthor.au_id) AS author_count, SUM(sales.qty * titles.price) AS total_revenue, SUM(sales.qty * titles.price) / COUNT(titleauthor.au_id) AS revenue_per_author
FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
JOIN titleauthor ON titles.title_id = titleauthor.title_id
JOIN authors ON titleauthor.au_id = authors.au_id
WHERE (authors.contract = 1) AND (sales.qty > 0)
GROUP BY publishers.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, publishers.city, titles.title_id, titles.title
HAVING (COUNT(titleauthor.au_id) > 0)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.revenue_per_author) AS avg_revenue_per_author
FROM (SELECT publishers.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, publishers.city, titles.title_id, titles.title, COUNT(titleauthor.au_id) AS author_count, SUM(sales.qty * titles.price) AS total_revenue, SUM(sales.qty * titles.price) / COUNT(titleauthor.au_id) AS revenue_per_author
FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
JOIN titleauthor ON titles.title_id = titleauthor.title_id
JOIN authors ON titleauthor.au_id = authors.au_id
WHERE (authors.contract = 1) AND (sales.qty > 0)
GROUP BY publishers.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, publishers.city, titles.title_id, titles.title
HAVING (COUNT(titleauthor.au_id) > 0)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.royalty_amount) AS total_royalty_amount
FROM (SELECT publishers.pub_name, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, titleauthor.royaltyper AS royalty, sales.qty, (sales.qty * titleauthor.royaltyper / 100) AS royalty_amount
FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
JOIN titleauthor ON titles.title_id = titleauthor.title_id
JOIN authors ON titleauthor.au_id = authors.au_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
WHERE (publishers.pub_name = 'Algodata Infosystems') AND (authors.contract = 1) AND (titleauthor.royaltyper = 100)) AS leaf_1

SELECT SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM (SELECT t.title_id, t.title, s.stor_id, s.qty, (t.price * s.qty) AS revenue
FROM titles t
JOIN sales s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
JOIN stores st ON s.stor_id = st.stor_id
WHERE ((t.type = 'business')) AND ((st.state = 'CA'))) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average of the revenue per author across all titles, where revenue per author for a title is calculated as the total revenue from sales of that title divided by the number of authors who wrote it?
